grants.comment: claude-runner coder sessions: read-only estate visibility (resource state + runtime logs) — the agent debugs deployed apps but cannot change Azure outside GitHub Actions.

claude-coder broker: open Arc cluster-connect tunnels to the shared homelab k3s cluster (claude-k8s-preview lives in rg-claude-runner-preview — cross-RG, so the coder repo's SP cannot self-assign this). Data-plane auth stays a least-priv in-cluster SA token; this role only permits listClusterUserCredential for the proxy.
roles: Azure Arc Enabled Kubernetes Cluster User Role
